Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Lucy F. Wang of the Attorney General's Office (703.5202) with Nancy N. Hom of the Department of Insurance (538.4144) for defendant and moving party; Braid Pezzaglia of Hinkle Jachimowicz Pointer & Emanuel (408.246.5500) for plaintiff and responding party. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
